title: Small RNA profiling by massive parallel sequencing in HTLV-1 asymptomatic subjects
author: Sabri Saeed Sanabani
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: In this study, we used a massive parallel sequencing technology to investigate the cellular small RNA operating in peripheral blood mononuclear cells of the Human T-lymphotropic virus type I infected asymptomatic subjects with a monoclonal and polyclonal rearrangement of the T-cell antigen receptor y-chain.
